# COLO (Compressed Uploads)

Secure, client-side, in-browser document resizer and PDF compressor designed for government portal upload specs (UPSC, SSC, NTA, JEE, NEET).

## Core Capabilities
- **Passport Photo Resizing:** Target precise aspect ratios (e.g., 3.5cm x 4.5cm or 550x550px) and exact file sizes (20KB - 50KB) with high-fidelity canvas anchor scaling.
- **Signature Scan Optimization:** Clean up raw smartphone photos of signatures by removing background shadows and gray noise, outputting high-contrast binarized ink.
- **PDF Certificate Compression:** Merge, crop, rotate, and compress multi-page PDF documents down to under 500KB or 300KB portal targets.
- **Batch Queue Processing:** Queue and compress multiple items concurrently using local worker threads.
- **100% Client-Side Privacy:** Powered by local WebAssembly. No documents or photos are ever sent to a server.

## Workspace Routes
- **Landing page (`/`):** Quick spec reference tables, generic features, and interactive visual demo of compressor results.
- **Image Optimizer (`/workspace/image`):** Tools for cropping, resizing, and binarizing photographs and signatures.
- **PDF Compressor (`/workspace/pdf`):** Tools for combining, compressing, rotating, and deleting pages of documents.
- **Diagnostics Panel (`/ops`):** Real-time client browser environment test suite and rendering performance loop monitoring.
